name: Remote
tagline: Hire and pay remote employees globally
description: Remote is a global HR platform that helps companies hire, manage, and pay employees and contractors worldwide. It offers Employer of Record services in 180+ countries, with transparent pricing and no hidden fees.
cons: Slower to add new countries vs Deel
use_cases: You want to hire full-time employees in countries where you have no legal entity, without setting up subsidiaries
You're managing a mix of international contractors and full-time employees and need compliant contracts for both
Your team needs transparent, predictable EOR pricing with no hidden fees baked into the quote
You want IP and invention rights automatically protected when onboarding engineers across multiple jurisdictions
